_meta.purpose: Per-building availability source registry for the Journal Square market study. Tracks the live availability-page URL and the extraction method that actually yields unit-level data, so a future automated agent can re-run daily and build a time-series rent/availability database.

field_guide.building: Display name as used in the study (matches comps[] / Individual Listings tab).
field_guide.url: Direct availability-page URL the user provided / that we pull from.
field_guide.method: dom_read = navigate then get_page_text returns units; portal = units live on a linked external leasing portal (capture portal_url); network_api = units come from an XHR/fetch JSON endpoint (capture api_endpoint); aggregator_fallback = live site unreadable, use TMD/aggregator labeled; unknown = not yet determined.
field_guide.js_rendered: true if units are injected client-side after load (affects timing/agent design).
field_guide.portal_url: If method=portal, the external listings URL (RentCafe/RealPage/Funnel/etc.).
field_guide.api_endpoint: If method=network_api, the JSON endpoint the page calls.
field_guide.last_successful_pull: ISO date of last good pull.
field_guide.notes: Render quirks, login walls, portal selectors, etc.

removed_from_core.reason: Availability page could not be located; no live individual-listing source. Dropped from the core competitive comp set. NOTE: still present in build_xlsx.py comp set + TMD survey until the next workbook rebuild (batched with real-data integration).
Co-living. AppFolio widget returns 300+ capped micro-studios (avg 383 SF) that would distort the Class A comp set; 1BR/3BR hidden behind the cap. Removed from core per user.

_meta.rentcafe_method: RentCafe/SecureCafe portals: building 'APPLY' link -> <prop>.securecafe.com/onlineleasing/<prop>/floorplans. Plan cards show starting rent + count + max SF. Drill each plan's 'View Details' (/floorplans/<slug>) for individual units listed as '#<unit> Starting at $<price>'. Per-unit SF not exposed; use floorplan max SF. Same system likely used by other JC comps.
_meta.sf_policy: Per-unit SF only when exact per-unit data is published. If a site shows SF at floorplan level only (or not at all), leave SF BLANK (do not substitute floorplan max). Decision 2026-06-08.
_meta.basis_audit: 2026-06-10: all 12 buildings' price basis audited against live pages (browser/web fetch). Verified basis lives in scrape.py BASIS config with per-building 'verified' provenance; derivation only where the site states the exact concession term.

buildings.notes: Renders full unit list into the page DOM. Navigate, let render, get_page_text returns all units with floorplan code, SF, rent, concession flags. SF by floorplan: S1=442,S2=456,M1=523,L1=831,L2=805,XL2=907(2BR+Den),XL3=892; floor inferred from unit number. BASIS VERIFIED 2026-06-10 (live browser): pricing is PER-UNIT — cards flagged '* Price includes concessions.' are NET-EFFECTIVE (3/21 today); unflagged cards are plain asking (18/21). Extractor captures the flag; June 8 all-net assumption superseded.

Units are server-rendered into <article> elements on /availabilities/ (NOT the singular /availability/ archive stub). No JSON feed; extract via document.querySelectorAll('article'), parse card innerText lines [type, bath, '### SQ. FT.', unit, '$price', 'Available date']. get_page_text returns only the first card, so use the JS DOM extractor. 35 units on 2026-06-08.

Div-grid (no <table>). Parse via regex over body.innerText: /([0-9A-Z][0-9A-Z\-]{2,6})\s+(STUDIO|\d\s+BEDROOMS?)\s+([\d.]+)\s+View\s+\$([\d,]+)/gi . NOTE plural '2 BEDROOMS'/'3 BEDROOMS'. NO SF or availability date in table (per-unit floor-plan only). Prices = BASE rent. Concession banner 'UP TO 2 MONTHS FREE'. 127 units 2026-06-08. BASIS CHANGE VERIFIED 2026-06-10: page footnote now states 'Rents reflect net effective pricing with 2 months free on a 20 month lease' — displayed price is NET-EFFECTIVE (June 8 note 'Prices = BASE rent' is superseded). Extractor re-validated live 2026-06-10: 150 units (54/80/13/3). UPDATE 2026-06-11: per-unit SF now read from the Yardi/RentCafe fiber feed at every pull (_with_fiber_sf) — in-feed; the 42-line stack model remains as fallback for any fiber-walk failure.

SOURCE SWITCHED 2026-06-10: marketing site (updated 6/4) now embeds a Rose Property widget (availability.rosenyc.com/availability/fnhqqlif/) with per-unit gross + net-effective + SF + dates — same platform as 345 Baldwin; site footnote: 'Net effective rent advertised'. Replaces the SecureCafe floorplan drill (asking-only, no SF). VALIDATED LIVE 2026-06-10: 51 units, all with gross + net-effective + exact per-unit SF + availability dates.

Units inline: '<type> RESIDENCE: <#> Floor Plan: <code> Sq.Ft: <n>[+NN(Balcony)] PRICE: $<n>/mo AVAILABLE FROM: <date>'. EXACT per-unit SF + availability dates. Regex on body.innerText. 'Limited Availability' (small 124-unit bldg). 7 units 2026-06-08 (1 Studio/6 1BR).

Modern Spaces iframe (buildingId=641805, frameTheme=theme55orchard). Load orchardjc.com/availability, then location.href=iframe.src (newdev.modernspacesnyc.com must be allowed). Units: '55 Orchard Street, <unit> ... $<price> [<n> Br] <n> Bth'; no 'Br'=studio. NO SF (blank), no avail date. 7 units 2026-06-08 (2 Studio/3 1BR/2 2BR); no pagination/lazy-load beyond these. VERIFIED 2026-06-10 (live): no concession/net-eff language on the widget — prices are plain asking; extractor validated (7 units).

Grid RESIDENCE|BEDROOM|BATHROOM|PRICE|FLOOR PLAN. Row '<res> <type> | <ba> Bath $<price>* VIEW APPLY'. PRICE = NET EFFECTIVE (site states so; concession 1mo/13, 2mo/24). NO SF (blank), no avail date. 12 units 2026-06-08 (5 Studio/4 1BR/2 2BR/1 3BR). PRICE_BASIS differs from asking-based buildings. TERM VERIFIED 2026-06-10: availability footnote = '2 months free on a 24 month lease' (use 2/24 to back-compute gross). SF SOURCE (2026-06-12): the public page publishes NO SF, but Greyson's RealPage online-leasing widget (9259416.onlineleasing.realpage.com — nested same-origin iframe #rp-leasing-widget, slow ~15-25s render, single-use #k= token, no clean JSON endpoint) exposes EXACT per-FLOOR-PLAN SF (26 plans, S1=392..D2=1103). Per-UNIT numbers are NOT published (need a dated application). Decision: keep the public site as the live daily pricing/availability scrape; harvest plan SF from RealPage OPPORTUNISTICALLY (not in the daily run — too fragile) into physical_attributes.json 'plans', feeding Greyson's TYPE-level SF only. Keep accruing plan codes until the full plan set is captured. PER-UNIT HARVEST: greyson_harvest.js (paste into the RealPage widget console) captures real unit numbers per plan (available-on-date only); ingest_greyson_harvest.py folds them into the physical store keyed by unit number, accruing across sessions toward full per-unit SF (-> in_feed).

Grid RESIDENCE|BED/BATH|TOTAL RENT|NET RENT*|FLOOR PLAN — BOTH asking and net per unit. SF IS AVAILABLE: the page is the same Yardi/RentCafe React platform as The Journal; per-unit Interior SF lives in the apartmentdata fiber array (also shown on the FLOOR PLAN > VIEW detail). scrape.py merges fiber SF into rows every pull (_with_fiber_sf). 37 units harvested 2026-06-11 (e.g. 3906=527 SF); no stack-line model — 505 stack SF varies by floor band. No avail date.

June-2026 redesign: grid RESIDENCE|BEDS/BATHS|INTERIOR SF.|EXTERIOR SF.|PRICE|FLOOR PLAN|STATUS. CRITICAL QUIRK: data rows OMIT empty <td> cells entirely (a 7-column header can sit over 4-cell rows), so positional column mapping breaks — _TABLE pattern-classifies cells when row shape differs from header (unit = first \d{2,5} cell; $ cells = prices; bare 200-3000 number = Interior SF, second = Exterior, ignored). Site lists BATHS ONLY ('1 BA'); beds inferred (1BA=1BR per TMD; flagged). PRICE = NET EFFECTIVE (footnote: one month free on a 13-month lease; extra $1,000-deposit sentence is ignored by the parser). SF blank when cells unrendered; Interior SF captured when present (in_feed). Verified live 2026-06-11: units 409 ($2,395 net) + 1010 ($2,765 net).

Rose Property widget (availability.rosenyc.com/availability/noeelbmj/). Load 345baldwin.com/availability -> location.href=iframe.src (availability.rosenyc.com allowed). Units: '<unit> 345 Baldwin Ave. <type> <n> BA <sf> Sq.Ft. $<gross> $<net> Net Effective Rent ... <date>'. EXACT SF + gross + NET-EFF + avail date. Concession 1mo free/12. 10 units 2026-06-08 (3 Studio/5 1BR/2 2BR).

Modern Spaces iframe (buildingId=635066), same system as Orchard. Load 55jordan.com/availability -> location.href=iframe.src (newdev.modernspacesnyc.com allowed). '55 Jordan Avenue, <unit> ... $<price> [<n> Br] <n> Bth'; no 'Br'=studio. NO SF (blank), no avail date. 6 units 2026-06-08 (2 Studio/2 1BR/2 2BR). CONCESSION CORRECTED 2026-06-10: site advertises 'Up to 3 months free & no broker fees' (term not stated) — June 8 'None' note was wrong. VERIFIED 2026-06-10 (live): widget shows no net-eff language — plain asking; extractor validated (6 units).

Greystar building, RealPage CMS site embeds a SightMap availability map. Units come from SightMap's same-origin JSON API (CI-safe GET, no DataDome). Extractor (EX['three_journal_square']) navigates the SightMap embed and fetches the API: per-unit unit#/area(SF)/price + beds/baths from floor_plan. Per-unit SF published -> in_feed. Price treated as ASKING (no net-eff/concession term advertised on the SightMap embed); revisit if a concession term is published. Validated 2026-06-18: 6 units (all 1BR), e.g. #0217 752sf $3299, #0615 687sf $3029. API ids (yjp2098rwxl/88239) derived from embed token d7p1mrk2pkx; re-derive if the embed changes.

No first-party leasing site; listed only on Zillow (PerimeterX bot-protected, unreachable from a CI browser). Fetched via the Zyte API (browserHtml + anti-ban, US geo) in zyte_baldwin.py — a Python-side PYFETCH fetcher, NOT the browser EX path. Parses __NEXT_DATA__ building.floorPlans[].units[] -> unit#/beds/baths/sqft/price/availableFrom. Per-unit SF published -> in_feed. Price = asking (Zillow advertised). REQUIRES ZYTE_API_KEY (GitHub Actions secret in CI; user env locally). Validated 2026-06-18: 7 studios, $2,100-$2,499, 500-660 SF.
